title: Mom Shocked After Learning Teen Sons Are Wanted Killers

beats.description: Dramatic opening montage introducing the mother, the murder, and interrogation snippets to immediately grab attention.
Backtracks to the morning of the crime, establishing the brothers' routine, Sierra's request, and the initial shooting.
First responders secure the scene, analyze the execution-style wounds, and identify the victim and his ex-girlfriend Sierra.
Sierra's initial interrogation reveals her nervousness, followed by a SWAT raid and the brothers' arrest and wiretapped transport.
Tyler's interrogation unravels his self-defense claim, followed by a second confrontation with Sierra where texts expose her orchestration.
Eli is interrogated with his mother present; his detailed account and YouTube training claims clash with evidence, leading to a lawyer request.
Emotional goodbyes, Tyler's final attempt to align stories, jail calls, and the epilogue covering Sierra's death and the brothers' sentencing.

_analysis_metadata.transcript_preview: This is Tiffany, mother of Tyler and Eli Chaffen. Just hours earlier, her two sons brutally killed a man and left his body by the side of the road. >> I felt I had to shoot wheels to make sure my brother didn't get hurt. This police are always trying to protect the children. >> As Tiffany listens in horror, the brothers insist they were only protecting each other. But the truth is far darker. >> Over the next 24 hours, Tiffany will face the worst day of her life as she slowly pieces together the horrifying truth that she's raised two terrifying killers. >> And your brother, your brother murdered somebody. >> I love you very much. ...
